query: What demand charges apply to commercial customers with demand >500 kW in California, within PG&E's territory, based on the OpenEI tariffs data? Answer should contain service class name and demand charge for at least 2 classes
final_answer:
Based on the **OpenEI IURDB tariff records** for **Pacific Gas & Electric Co. (PG&E), EIA utility ID 14328**, filtered to **California, Commercial sector, active approved bundled tariffs**, the PG&E commercial tariffs in the data for customers with **peak demand ≥500 kW** are Schedule **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU** variants. OpenEI marks these records with `peakkwcapacitymin: 500` and `peakkwcapacitymax: 999`. Source: OpenEI `get_utility_tariffs` API results; underlying PG&E tariff source listed in OpenEI records: `https://www.pge.com/tariffs/assets/pdf/tariffbook/ELEC_SCHEDS_E-19.pdf`.

| PG&E service class / tariff name | Applicability in OpenEI | Demand charge fields in OpenEI |
|---|---:|---|
| **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Secondary)** | `peakkwcapacitymin: 500`, `peakkwcapacitymax: 999`; voltage category: Secondary | **Flat demand charge:** **$42.10/kW**. **TOU demand charges:** **$0.00/kW, $0.00/kW, $16.44/kW, $21.59/kW** by demand-period tier. Source: OpenEI record `69de7e4cd600f18ec30600ac`. |
| **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU Option R (Secondary)** | `peakkwcapacitymin: 500`, `peakkwcapacitymax: 999`; voltage category: Secondary | **Flat demand charge:** **$42.10/kW**. **TOU demand charges:** **$0.00/kW, $0.00/kW, $16.44/kW, $21.59/kW** by demand-period tier. Source: OpenEI record `69de7a20e547dde41109edff`. |
| **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU Option R (Primary)** | `peakkwcapacitymin: 500`, `peakkwcapacitymax: 999`; voltage category: Primary | **Flat demand charge:** **$33.10/kW**. **TOU demand charges:** **$0.00/kW, $0.00/kW, $14.86/kW, $18.71/kW** by demand-period tier. Source: OpenEI record `69de7c756d1ebb0263094f0d`. |
| **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU Option R (Transmission)** | `peakkwcapacitymin: 500`, `peakkwcapacitymax: 999`; voltage category: Transmission | **Flat demand charge:** **$16.47/kW**. **TOU demand charge:** **$0.00/kW** in OpenEI demand-rate structure. Source: OpenEI record `69de7d02edea9919e60bad8e`. |

Notes: I excluded the “Voluntary” E-19 records where OpenEI shows `peakkwcapacitymax: 500`, because the question asks for customers with demand **>500 kW**. Demand charges above are exactly as represented in OpenEI’s `flatdemandstructure` and `demandratestructure` fields.
